category_sources: source_facts.description says Practical Music Search is an ncurses-based MPD client; official GitHub README describes an interactive Vim-like console client for Music Player Daemon.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use the expanded name Practical Music Search.
docs_sources: Official README says documentation is available in the project repository; official homepage provides introduction and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links View on GitHub, and GitHub redirects ambientsound/pms to kimtore/pms.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify MPD client, console/TUI behavior, Vim-like interface, and music search features.
